outputRequestDescription.zh-CN: 必填：说明你希望本次工具调用返回什么内容。绝不能省略、传 null 或空字符串。需要原始结果时严格传 RAW（不区分大小写的三个 ASCII 字母）；普通 grep/read/find/ls 若用户未明确要求摘要，也传 RAW。只有明确需要压缩时才传描述性 prompt。对于 bash 等执行命令的工具，若只需要编译或测试的通过/失败和错误摘要，请使用描述性 prompt；需要完整日志、完整提取语法/参数/SQL，或逐行调试时才使用 RAW。不要使用“完整输出”或“完整提取”等自然语言作为值；该字段不会传给底层工具。
outputRequestDescription.en-US: Required: describe what you want this tool call to return. Never omit it, use null, or use an empty string. Use exactly RAW (the three ASCII letters, case-insensitive) when the original result is needed; for ordinary grep/read/find/ls calls, use RAW unless the user explicitly asks for a summary. Use a descriptive prompt only when compression is explicitly wanted. For command-execution tools such as bash, use a descriptive prompt when you only need pass/fail and an error summary; use RAW for full logs, complete syntax/parameter/SQL extraction, or line-by-line debugging. Do not use natural-language values such as "full output" or "complete extraction"; this field is removed before the underlying tool runs.

outputRequestSystemGuideline.zh-CN: 强制工具调用规则：每次调用任何带有 outputRequest 的工具时，都必须在 arguments 中通过 outputRequest 说明你希望返回什么内容。绝不能省略、传 null 或空字符串。普通 grep/read/find/ls 调用默认使用 outputRequest=RAW；只有用户明确要求摘要或压缩时，才传描述性 outputRequest。RAW 必须是严格的三个 ASCII 字母。
outputRequestSystemGuideline.en-US: MANDATORY tool-call rule: whenever a tool exposes outputRequest, include outputRequest in the arguments of every call and use it to describe what you want returned. Never omit it, use null, or use an empty string. For ordinary grep/read/find/ls calls, default to outputRequest=RAW; use a descriptive outputRequest only when the user explicitly asks for summarization or compression. RAW must be exactly the three ASCII letters.

positiveInteger.zh-CN: 请输入大于 0 的整数。

modelInput.zh-CN: 模型（provider/model；留空使用当前会话模型）
modelInput.en-US: Model (provider/model; leave empty to use the current session model)

modelInvalid.zh-CN: 请输入 provider/model，或留空使用当前会话模型。
modelInvalid.en-US: Use provider/model, or leave empty to use the current session model.

configWarnings.zh-CN: 配置有警告，将以可用值打开：{warnings}
configWarnings.en-US: Configuration warnings; opening with usable values: {warnings}

interactiveOnly.zh-CN: 交互式设置需要在带 UI 的 Pi 会话中运行。
interactiveOnly.en-US: Interactive settings require a Pi session with UI.

finalLimit.zh-CN: 最终输出上限：{value} 字符

commandDescription.zh-CN: 交互式配置工具输出提炼
